Bash(python3 -c " content = open\('lib/supabase/types.ts', 'rb'\).read\(\).decode\('utf-16-le', errors='ignore'\) lines = content.split\('\\n'\) for i, line in enumerate\(lines\): if 'logo' in line.lower\(\) or 'startup' in line.lower\(\): print\(f'{i+1}: {line}'\) ")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const buf = fs.readFileSync\('lib/supabase/types.ts'\); const txt = buf.toString\('utf16le'\); const lines = txt.split\('\\n'\); lines.forEach\(\(l,i\) => { if\(l.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('logo'\)\) console.log\(i+1, l.trim\(\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const buf = fs.readFileSync\('lib/supabase/types.ts'\); const txt = buf.toString\('utf16le'\); const lines = txt.split\('\\n'\); lines.forEach\(\(l,i\) => { if\(l.includes\('logo_storage'\) || l.includes\('logo_updated'\) || l.includes\('startup_id'\) && i > 500 && i < 560\) { console.log\(i+1, l.trim\(\)\); } }\); ")
